About The Spot

The Spot is an inclusive movement studio located at 27 King William Street, operating from the second floor of Sky Dragon Studios. We offer affordable movement classes for all bodies, genders, and abilities.

Directions

  • 27 King William Street, 2nd Floor
  • Enter through Relay Coffee, which is located on the first floor. Walk straight to the back and turn left at the industrial doors. Take the stairs up to the second floor.

Notes for Class

  • Take off your shoes before entering the studio space.
  • Bring a water bottle and wear fitted fitness clothes.
  • Clean mats and class equipment are provided.
  • Classes are accessible via stairs only.
  • Street parking costs $2 per hour BUT it's free on Saturdays, Sundays, and after 6:00pm on weekdays.

Contact

Please contact Renata via email if you have any questions.
